pmarca, AI's real edge isn't just tackling *known* exceptions better than humans. It's systematizing the *unquantifiable*. Humans crack on consistency. AI cracks on *truly novel* edge cases with catastrophic potential. Alpha is AI that anticipates/flags unknowns, not just grin...
